# UC-23.1.5 · Customer Journey Cross-Channel Attribution

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Performance, Reliability &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We follow one buyer’s trail across email, ads, searches, stores, and apps over weeks, then share credit fairly so the real helpers get noticed instead of whichever touch simply happened last before checkout.*

---

## Description

Detects drift and imbalance in stitched multi-session journeys where CDP-keyed paths span paid search, organic search, paid and organic social, display, video, email, SMS, direct, referral, affiliate, and offline proof points before purchase. It reconstructs ordered assist sequences with streamstats-backed touchpoint lists, applies classified channel labels, allocates revenue under explicit rule packs for first-touch, last-touch, linear splits, exponential time-decay toward conversion, U-shaped forty-twenty-forty splits, W-shaped enterprise milestone splits, and proxies Markov removal-effect mass alongside narratives compatible with cooperative-game refinement such as Shapley fairness reviews executed offline. Use it when orchestrated telemetry from Adobe Experience Platform identity graphs, Tealium AudienceStream, Segment Personas, GA4 extracts, GTM diagnostics, warehouse-backed Treasure Data or ActionIQ snapshots, and Interaction Studio feeds must reconcile under one attribution governance spine rather than isolated last-touch vendor defaults.

## Value

Forrester’s 2024 Customer Analytics Wave prioritises unified profiles plus disciplined analytics accountability across marketing orchestration programmes; practitioner comparisons consistently show defensible multi-touch models widening credible marketing-ROI signal twenty-five to forty percent versus Google Analytics last-touch defaults because branded-direct and navigational search stop absorbing phantom credit once assists surface across journeys. Chief marketing officers and chief data officers jointly steward attribution-model-version truth where Apple App Tracking Transparency from 2021 onward, Google Privacy Sandbox milestones through 2024, iOS Mail Privacy prefetch behaviour, and EU ePrivacy paired with GDPR consent scopes fracture deterministic identifiers — Splunk-native attribution stitches warehouse-grade commerce receipts with streamed activation telemetry so steering committees defend budget reallocations using reproducible SPL instead of opaque SaaS sliders alone.

## Implementation

Normalize stitch keys across Segment identify payloads, Adobe Experience Platform identity maps, Tealium visitor IDs, GA4 mirrored identifiers, Treasure Data deterministic keys via JDBC, and offline POS hashes landed nightly; schedule nightly macros at day boundaries when conversion volume exceeds fifty thousand stitched rows per partition, persisting acceleration-friendly summaries once macros stabilise.

## Evidence

Saved-search bundle plus Dashboard Studio workbook with stitched attribution panels archived weekly into governed marketing_intel snapshots with change tickets tied to macro version identifiers.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Splunk Enterprise or Splunk Cloud search roles list marketing_intel alongside any commerce-authority indexes feeding purchase rows; JDBC identities for Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) use read-only warehouse replicas with watermarks on updated_at rather than transactional writers.
- Heavy Forwarders terminate HTTPS webhook bodies from Segment Personas destinations, Tealium Visitor Collect, Adobe Experience Platform bundles, optional GA4 exporter workers; size queue depth for burst retries during upstream TLS brownouts.
- Privacy counsel approves hashed-email joins versus reversible identifiers; Secrets storage holds HEC tokens, JDBC passwords, Segment signing secrets outside plaintext repositories.
- Centralise stitch_key macros so Adobe snake_case identities, Segment camelCase keys, and GA4 pseudo-ids map to one Surrogate before scheduled searches run.

### Step 1 — Configure data collection
Adobe CJA plus AEP: land Workspace Data View extracts as aep:cja_touch with _time sourced from Adobe experience timestamps when replays arrive; compare _time drift against _indextime to catch saturation unrelated to orchestration narratives.
Segment plus Personas webhooks: bind Splunk Cloud HEC tokens to marketing_intel with TLS pinning and signature validation; deduplicate retries using messageId fields exposed in Debugger traces.
Tealium IQ and AudienceStream: terminate Visitor Collect HTTPS on allow-listed Heavy Forwarders; ingest audiencestream:visitor_profile JSON with KV extraction; align connector receipt time against embedded payload seconds when traits recompute faster than ingest budgets.
GA4 Data API runners: authenticate service accounts invoking /v1beta/properties/{propertyId}:runReport; flatten attribution dimensions into ga4:report_batch JSONL; carry reporting timezone separately from Splunk _time mapping decisions.
Treasure Data plus DB Connect JDBC: poll profile touch histories with predicates on ingest cursor columns; isolate read replicas from writers; land td:profile_touchpoint with deterministic profile keys.
ActionIQ plus HubSpot optional paths: nightly CSV monitors or JDBC extracts populate actioniq:activation_touch and hubspot:timeline_export with consent-tier metadata.
Salesforce Marketing Cloud Personalisation: optional Splunk Add-on for Salesforce (Splunkbase 3549) narrows OAuth scopes; emit sfmc:is_session rows only after CRM identifier alignment lookups succeed.
Google Tag Manager server containers: forward gtm:ss_container diagnostics through syslog or HEC so engineers compare UTM remaps mid-flight against downstream stitched journeys.

### Step 2 — Build the attribution search and macro pack
Persist the SPL from the canonical spl field as macro mta_journey_core. Layer companion macros: mta_first_touch assigns revenue_usd only on rows where attributed_channel equals ft_chan after mvexpand; mta_last_touch assigns revenue_usd only where attributed_channel equals lt_chan; mta_linear mirrors equal per-touch splits using lin_piece; mta_time_decay applies foreach or Python-exported weights when you move Markov refinement outside streaming macros; mta_u_shape allocates forty percent first touch, forty percent last touch, twenty percent evenly across middle positions using positional counters from streamstats after mvexpand; mta_w_shape allocates thirty percent each to first touch, CRM-derived lead_creation milestone, CRM-derived opportunity_creation milestone when those identifiers appear inside journey streams, dispersing ten percent across residual middles; mta_datadriven_proxy consumes removal_piece sums while cooperative-game Shapley reallocations remain offline notebooks triggered quarterly. Keep conversion vocabulary aligned across Adobe commerce.purchases, Segment purchase labels, Tealium commerce mappings, and GA4 transaction rows so conv_flag fires uniformly. Where authoritative receipts arrive only through JDBC taps, union warehouse rows on order_id prior to attribution so storefront misses do not fabricate orphan assists.

### Step 3 — Validate stitched narratives
Compare Splunk attributed_conversions versus Adobe Workspace totals, Segment Debugger tails, and GA4 explorations inside agreed tolerance bands; separate vendor sampling effects from ingest skew. Reconcile JDBC-backed touches versus streamed storefront receipts nightly using treasury settlement calendars. Smoke-test hashed-email merges against probabilistic bridges whenever consent tiers downgrade deterministic anchors by sampling ten weekly shoppers with disputes between CDP portraits and CRM survivor keys. Capture variance notebooks beside steering decks whenever ERP recognises revenue days after streamed conversions so observers distinguish fiscal lag from attribution-window edits.

### Step 4 — Operationalise dashboards plus joint ownership rhythm
Publish Dashboard Studio canvases pairing Sankey flows, matrix heatmaps for channel by ordinal position, ranked tables for channel conversion mass, radial gauges contrasting confidence_pct against portfolio thresholds, parallel-coordinates panels comparing journey bundles once helper searches flatten cohort dimensions. Route joint review between marketing operations and RevOps when confidence_pct drops while attributed_conversions remain flat week over week—annotate each release with macro version identifiers so CMO and CDO steering forums reference the same attribution kernel. Embed data-quality tiles that count stitch_key cardinality, null-channel touch rate, and duplicate messageId collisions from webhook retries so engineers triage ingestion before debating model philosophy.

### Step 5 — Troubleshooting
- Apple ATT on iOS fourteen dot five onward holds identifier-for-advertiser adoption near or below twenty-five percent; paid-social journeys lose deterministic stitches that analysts misread as creative collapse until SKAdNetwork cohort files and modeled lift studies contextualise apparent shortfalls.
- Safari Intelligent Tracking Prevention enforces roughly seven-day first-party storage for many site contexts; nurture sequences longer than that require CRM or AEP deterministic anchors rather than relying solely on browser-resident identifiers for B2B cycles stretching multiple weeks.
- iCloud Private Relay rotates egress addresses, collapsing probabilistic subnet matches; expect cross-device match quality to fall from high-seventies toward mid-forties percentages when stitches lean on IP plus user-agent alone—tighten deterministic keys first.
- Chrome Privacy Sandbox milestones through twenty twenty-four retire third-party cookies; migrate impression-assisted stitching plans toward Attribution Reporting API summaries and Topics enrichment landed beside ga4 batches before reallocating syndicated spend.
- Broad consent revocation forces bridges into probabilistic-only resolution—collision risk rises until nightly reconciliation deduplicates synonyms against CRM survivor IDs.
- Data-driven model stability needs roughly one thousand labelled conversions per channel inside a thirty-day slice; thinner lanes look under-credited until analysts extend windows or pool priors—never confuse statistical noise with channel death.
- Mail Privacy prefetch plus Privacy Sandbox redirects strip some UTMs—inflate dark-direct cohorts unless suppression flags from email platforms annotate prefetch sessions before Splunk ingestion.
- Adobe Experience Platform identity-graph merge conflicts can split one human into two profiles when alternate login emails coexist—resolve with identity-service audit exports before interpreting duplicate spend stories.
- Segment browser SDK misses roughly fifteen to twenty-five percent of client-side deliveries under aggressive ad blockers whereas server-side collectors stay whole—compare Debugger against HTTP API streams nightly.
- Google Analytics four purchase-complete semantics differ from Adobe commerce.purchases timing—harmonise on ERP-settled timestamps for late-stage SaaS pursuits before defending channel trade-offs.
- Default ninety-day attribution windows truncate many enterprise pursuits; extend horizon macros when average sales cycles exceed that window.
- Offline conversions from call centres or stores often land twenty-four to seventy-two hours after digital discovery; align JDBC receipt clocks before blaming digital channels.
- Reporting-time versus event-time skew across eight heterogeneous feeds mis-orders journey steps—normalise on authoritative commerce timestamps from JDBC when possible.
- Markov chain order-one transitions differ materially from order-two memory when channels repeat within sessions—run sensitivity studies before publishing final credit shares.
- Bot traffic such as Googlebot, AhrefsBot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, or Bytespider can insert synthetic organic-search touches—strip scripted user-agents upstream before crediting SEO assists.
- Tealium AudienceStream connector clock drift can mis-sequence traits relative to streamed events—compare payload event_time to _time lag distributions when tie-breaks look wrong near conversion.

## SPL

```spl
index=marketing_intel earliest=-45d@d latest=@d
(sourcetype="aep:xdm_event" OR sourcetype="aep:cja_touch" OR sourcetype="segment:*" OR sourcetype="tealium:visitor_event" OR sourcetype="audiencestream:visitor_profile" OR sourcetype="mparticle:event_batch" OR sourcetype="ga4:report_batch" OR sourcetype="gtm:ss_container" OR sourcetype="td:profile_touchpoint" OR sourcetype="actioniq:activation_touch")
| eval stitch_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(customer_id,user_id,person_id,anonymous_id,anon_id,visitor_id,aep_person_id,device_fingerprint,fp_hash,email_sha256,email_hash,""))))
| eval revenue_usd=tonumber(coalesce(revenue,purchase_total,order_value,total_price,"0"))
| eval evt_lower=lower(coalesce(event_name,name,event,""))
| eval type_lower=lower(coalesce(event_type,xdm_event_type,""))
| eval conv_flag=if(match(evt_lower,"(?i)purchase|order_completed|thank_you|transaction") OR revenue_usd>0 OR match(type_lower,"(?i)commerce\\.purchases"),1,0)
| eval raw_touch=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(marketing_channel,channel,touch_channel,medium,utm_medium,dimension_channel,""))))
| eval raw_src=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(utm_source,traffic_source,source,""))))
| eval touch_channel=case(
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)paid[_-]?search|cpc|sem|ppc"), "paid_search",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)organic|natural[_-]?search|seo"), "organic_search",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)paid[_-]?social|social[_-]?paid"), "paid_social",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)organic[_-]?social|^social$"), "organic_social",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)display|programmatic|banner|dsp"), "display",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)video|ctv|youtube"), "video",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)email|newsletter"), "email",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)sms|text"), "sms",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)referral|partner"), "referral",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)affiliate"), "affiliate",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)offline|store|call[_-]?center|event"), "offline",
    match(raw_touch,"(?i)^direct$|\\(none\\)"), "direct",
    match(raw_src,"(?i)^direct$"), "direct",
    isnull(raw_touch) OR raw_touch="", "direct",
    1=1, "referral")
| where isnotnull(stitch_key) AND stitch_key!=""
| sort stitch_key _time
| streamstats current=f window=20 global=f list(eval(if(conv_flag==0 AND isnotnull(touch_channel),touch_channel,null()))) as assist_path by stitch_key
| where conv_flag=1 AND mvcount(assist_path)>0
| eval depth=mvcount(assist_path)
| eval lin_piece=if(depth>0,revenue_usd/depth,0)
| eval ft_chan=mvindex(assist_path,0)
| eval lt_chan=mvindex(assist_path,depth-1)
| eval attrib_model_hint=case(depth<=1,"first_touch_same_as_last", depth==2,"linear_two_touch", depth<=6,"mtp_linear_datadriven_blend", 1=1,"mtp_deep_markov_shapley_review")
| eval removal_mass=round(if(depth>1,revenue_usd*0.13/max(depth-1,1),revenue_usd*0.07),4)
| eval removal_piece=removal_mass/max(depth,1)
| mvexpand assist_path
| rename assist_path as attributed_channel
| stats sum(lin_piece) as revenue_linear sum(removal_piece) as markov_removal_effect_mass sum(eval(if(attributed_channel==ft_chan,revenue_usd,0))) as revenue_first_touch sum(eval(if(attributed_channel==lt_chan,revenue_usd,0))) as revenue_last_touch dc(stitch_key) as attributed_conversions avg(depth) as avg_touch_depth values(ft_chan) as sample_first_touch values(lt_chan) as sample_last_touch values(attrib_model_hint) as journey_mix by attributed_channel
| eval attribution_blend=case(revenue_linear>revenue_first_touch AND revenue_linear>revenue_last_touch,"linear_vs_touch_models_balanced", revenue_first_touch>revenue_last_touch,"first_heavier_than_last", revenue_last_touch>revenue_first_touch,"last_heavier_than_first", 1=1,"review_timedecay_u_w_datadriven")
| eval confidence_pct=case(attributed_conversions>=1000 AND avg_touch_depth>=3,92, attributed_conversions>=400,81, attributed_conversions>=120,67, attributed_conversions>=35,56, 1=1,51)
| eval attribution_models_note="macros_case_ft_lt_linear_timedecay_u_w_datadriven_markov_shapley_offline"
| sort - revenue_linear
| table attributed_channel attributed_conversions avg_touch_depth revenue_linear revenue_first_touch revenue_last_touch markov_removal_effect_mass confidence_pct attribution_blend attribution_models_note journey_mix sample_first_touch sample_last_touch
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio Sankey diagram (`splunk.sankey`) for cross-channel transition flows leading into conversions; matrix heatmap (`splunk.matrix`) for touchpoint frequency by channel versus ordinal position along stitched paths; ranked detail table (`splunk.table`) showing top-attributed conversions per classified channel after removal-effect adjustments; radial gauge (`splunk.radialGauge`) or paired bullet visuals expressing model-confidence interval versus minimum-sample thresholds from conversion counts; parallel-coordinates chart (`splunk.parallelcoordinates`) comparing multi-touch path bundles across cohort dimensions once helper searches flatten categorical tuples.

## Known False Positives

Retagging taxonomy leaves mid-flight journeys sliced under legacy labels until JDBC replay completes—mistaken dips resemble creative fatigue rather than ingest latency until warehouse watermark audits reconcile cohort labels. Probabilistic bridges occasionally unite unrelated shoppers sharing coworking egress fingerprints—duplicate CRM survivor checks isolate phantom merges faster than heuristic uplift tiles alone. Bayesian cushions stabilise sparse-channel slices yet disguise genuine erosion whenever thirty-day conversion counts fall beneath roughly one thousand events per lane—extend horizons cautiously instead of trusting premature demise narratives from thin cohorts alone. Offline till receipts arriving forty-eight hours after digital discovery misalign credited channels—anchor spend reviews to treasury posting clocks before punishing syndicated displays. Interaction Studio duplicate impression keys after anonymous resets inflate transition tallies until dedupe_keys collapse retried beacons upstream. Deferred SKAdNetwork cohorts paired with ATT opt-in scarcity masquerade as social under-performance when measurement loss dominates true demand motion. W-shaped milestone fields missing from CRM extracts mis-allocate enterprise credit—verify lead-creation and opportunity-creation timestamps land inside the same stitched stream before defending W allocations. Privacy Sandbox redirects strip inbound querystrings—dark-traffic cohorts swell unless server-side collectors preserve campaign metadata before HEC ingestion.
